title: Polystichum × flagellare

intro: Polystichum × flagellare, also known as the hybrid holly fern, is a rare hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Polystichum × flagellare include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
